name: cvd-record carries the fixed_in remediation version on each disclosure record (the 'and fix' half)
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","advisory_id":"GHSA-x","source":"cisa-kev"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","advisory_id":"GHSA-y","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings f.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'advisory=GHSA-x .*fixed_in=4.17.21' e.txt && echo c23-fixed-in 1>&2
